# IndexRidge UK Agricultural NDVI GeoTIFF Sample Layer

IndexRidge sells a £19 digital download containing a Sentinel-2 derived UK agricultural NDVI GeoTIFF sample layer plus JSON metadata report, README, and license/disclaimer.

Primary landing page: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/geospectral-data-portal/
Gumroad product: https://ridgeindex.gumroad.com/l/indexridge-uk-agricultural-ndvi-geotiff-sample-layer

Use cases: QGIS, ArcGIS Pro, GDAL, rasterio, Python GIS, remote-sensing workflow testing, vegetation-index dashboard prototypes, raster ETL smoke tests.

Limitations: analytical sample only; not official, legal, insurance, planning, financial, or regulatory data; no AWS Marketplace/Data Exchange approval is claimed.
